Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:sound here].

====== Class Sound ======
<pre>
===== See also: =====
</pre>

[[Lua global#sounds|sounds]]

===== play =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 play([x, y | object] [, loudness, pitch, pitchVariation])
</pre>

Plays a sound either at position (x, y) on the map, or attached to
object //object// (depending on which is passed to the function).

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618080812/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:sound -->
